title: Alanis Morissette
full_description: Alanis Morissette brings Jagged Little Pill — her 1995 album that sold 33 million copies and defined a generation of female alt-rock — back to stages across Europe in celebration of its 30th anniversary. With songs like Ironic, You Oughta Know, and Hand in My Pocket performed live, her shows blend cathartic anthems with moments of searing intimacy.
ai_summary: Alanis Morissette marks 30 years of Jagged Little Pill with a European arena tour — performing the album that made her one of the most important voices in 1990s rock to a generation of fans who grew up with it, and a new generation discovering it for the first time.
